title: limnophila heterophylla var. reflexa
intro: Limnophila heterophylla var. reflexa, also known as 'Thai Basil', is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Limnophila heterophylla var. reflexa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine practices in Southeast Asia.
